description.para: Register offsets from the base address of an QSPI device.
This register contains various control bits that affect the operation of the QSPI device.
Read/Write.

briefdescription.para: Size of word to be transferred.

memberdef.name: XQSPIPS_CR_RESET_MASK_SET
memberdef.initializer: XQSPIPS_CR_IFMODE_MASK | \ XQSPIPS_CR_SSCTRL_MASK | \ XQSPIPS_CR_DATA_SZ_MASK | \ XQSPIPS_CR_MSTREN_MASK | \ XQSPIPS_CR_SSFORCE_MASK | \ XQSPIPS_CR_HOLD_B_MASK

memberdef.name: XQSPIPS_CR_RESET_MASK_CLR
memberdef.initializer: XQSPIPS_CR_CPOL_MASK | \ XQSPIPS_CR_CPHA_MASK | \ XQSPIPS_CR_PRESC_MASK | \ XQSPIPS_CR_MANSTRTEN_MASK | \ XQSPIPS_CR_MANSTRT_MASK | \ XQSPIPS_CR_ENDIAN_MASK | \ XQSPIPS_CR_REF_CLK_MASK

description.para: This register holds the interrupt status flags for an QSPI device. Some of the flags are level triggered, which means that they are set as long as the interrupt condition exists. Other flags are edge triggered, which means they are set once the interrupt condition occurs and remain set until they are cleared by software. The interrupts are cleared by writing a '1' to the interrupt bit position in the Status Register. Read/Write.
This register is used to enable chosen interrupts for an QSPI device. Writing a '1' to a bit in this register sets the corresponding bit in the QSPI Interrupt Mask register. Write only.
This register is used to disable chosen interrupts for an QSPI device. Writing a '1' to a bit in this register clears the corresponding bit in the QSPI Interrupt Mask register. Write only.
This register shows the enabled/disabled interrupts of an QSPI device. Read only.

All four registers have the same bit definitions. They are only defined once for each of the Interrupt Enable Register, Interrupt Disable Register, Interrupt Mask Register, and Channel Interrupt Status Register

briefdescription.para: Interrupts which need write to clear.

description.para: This register is used to enable or disable an QSPI device.
Read/Write
This register is used to program timing delays in slave mode.
Read/Write

briefdescription.para: Delay to de-assert slave select between two words mask.
Delay to de-assert slave select between two words shift.

description.para: This register defines the number of pclk cycles the slave waits for a the QSPI clock to become stable in quiescent state before it can detect the start of the next transfer in CPHA = 1 mode.
Read/Write
This register defines the watermark setting for the Transmit FIFO.
This register defines the watermark setting for the Receive FIFO.
This macro provides the depth of transmit FIFO and receive FIFO.
This register contains various control bits that affect the operation of the Linear QSPI controller.
Read/Write.

briefdescription.para: Mode value for dual I/O or quad I/O.
Number of dummy bytes between addr and return read data.

description.para: This register contains various status bits of the Linear QSPI controller.
Read/Write.
This register contains various bit masks of Loopback Delay Adjust Register.
Bit Masks of above SLCR Registers .

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to the target register.

simplesect.para: The value read from the register.
C-Style signature: u32 XQspiPs_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress. int RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device.
contains the offset from the 1st register of the device to target register.
is the value to be written to the register.

simplesect.para: C-Style signature: void XQspiPs_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, int RegOffset, u32 RegisterValue)

briefdescription.para: Resets QSPI by disabling the device and bringing it to reset state through register writes.
Initializes QSPI to Linear mode with default QSPI boot settings.
